Yuan Sui иўҒз¶Ҹ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Sui (иўҒз¶Ҹ)was born in Guangling. Left in charge of Guangling when Zhang Zhao joined the Coalition against Dong. Yuan Sui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
